mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, name, title, department, phone, avatar, introduction, status FROM doctor WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor (username, password, name, title, department, phone, introduction, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{title}, #{department}, #{phone}, #{introduction}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE doctor SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
